scores.correctness_notes: Correctly covers change/task hierarchy, ready flag, polling and blocking wait. Misses CLI commands (pebble changes, pebble tasks), the /v1/changes API endpoints, change-update notices, and the state persistence detail. The ChangeStatus enum values shown (Do/Doing/Done/Undo/Undoing/Error/Abort/Hold/Wait) are reasonable but not verified against gold standard.
scores.hallucination_notes: container.replan() returning a change_id is questionable — ops.Container.replan() doesn't return a change ID in practice. The get_plan() call shown in context is incorrect/misleading. client.wait_change() signature with delay parameter may not match actual API. Minor inaccuracies rather than wholesale fabrication.
